creator: vegeta@tuxpowered.net
text: There are places in pf where source nodes are accessed without proper locking. Do you feel brave? I have written this patch https://reviews.freebsd.org/D39880 but it's written for the main branch of code, does quite much more than just fixing locking, and I have not had time yet to test it on any real server, just did some synthetic tests. Would you be able to try it out?
